## How I tested it

- [ ] Built it in Roblox Studio with the `Roblox_Studio` MCP connected
- [ ] Verified the result with `screen_capture`

## Checklist

- [ ] Small and focused (one skill or one fix)
- [ ] Follows the anti-slop quality bar (`knowledge/anti-ai-slop.md`)
- [ ] Works inside a named `Workspace/<Name>` folder and does not delete the user's work
- [ ] Risky ops wrapped in `pcall`; no fake/guessed asset IDs
